No Poverty.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any explicit or implicit content related to poverty eradication or economic resources for the poor.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any explicit or implicit content related to food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any explicit or implicit content related to health services, disease prevention, or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course directly focuses on school administration, leadership, organizational theory, curriculum, and teacher management, all fundamental to achieving quality education and effective learning environments (Targets 4.a, 4.c).

Gender Equality.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any explicit or implicit content related to gender equality, discrimination, or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any explicit or implicit content related to water, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any explicit or implicit content related to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course prepares students for the 'educational workplace' and covers 'teacher professional rights and obligations,' directly linking to Target 8.8 on protecting labor rights.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any explicit or implicit content related to industrialization, infrastructure development, or innovation in the context of SDG 9 targets.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course discusses 'school tracking' and 'education choice,' which are policy issues directly related to ensuring equal educational opportunity and reducing inequalities (Targets 10.2, 10.3).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any explicit or implicit content related to sustainable urbanization, housing, transport, or community planning.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any explicit or implicit content related to sustainable consumption, production patterns, or resource efficiency.

Climate Action.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any explicit or implicit content related to climate change mitigation, adaptation, or awareness.

Life Below Water.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any explicit or implicit content related to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or sustainable fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any explicit or implicit content related to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or sustainable land management.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course directly addresses 'School Administration,' 'organizational theory,' and 'principal leadership,' which are fundamental to developing effective, accountable, and transparent institutions (Target 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any explicit or implicit content related to global partnerships, international cooperation, or resource mobilization for sustainable development.
